---
title: "California Oil Well EDA"
author: "Lukas Lescano"
date: "2026-04-30"
format: pdf
---

# 1. Set up

## Packages

```{r}
#| label: packages
#| message: false

# general use and cleaning
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(snakecase)

# file organization
library(here)

# wrap axis labels
library(scales)

# reading .xlsx files
library(readxl)

# visualize missing data
library(naniar)

# arrange plots
library(patchwork)
```


## Data

```{r}
#| label: data

table1 <- read_xlsx(here("data", "CubeBrowserTableExport_2322B09F.xlsx"))
table2 <- read_xlsx(here("data", "CubeBrowserTableExport_75677428.xlsx"))
table3 <- read_xlsx(here("data", "CubeBrowserTableExport_41525648.xlsx"))

```
